scripts.dev: concurrently -n "frontend,worker" -c "bgGreen.bold,bgBlue.bold" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npx wrangler pages dev --proxy=5173"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy frontend/dist
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend && cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.db:migrate: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply homework-helper
scripts.db:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply homework-helper --local
